json_ld.name: World Cup 2026 match schedule dataset
json_ld.alternateName: World Cup 2026 Tour public fixtures dataset
json_ld.description: Free machine-readable dataset for all 104 FIFA World Cup 2026 fixtures, including match ids, teams, venues, stages, groups, UTC kickoff times, local-time API links, share-card links, and calendar links.
